examples: It is not rare for the neatherd's boy nowadays to bear the name of Arthur, Alfred, or Alphonse.
Alphonse wants you to throw it.
Alphonse wants you to throw the ball.
The first to go was Alphonse Gangitano, shot dead in his home in 1998.
In the 19th century, Alphonse Bertillon, a French photographer and the son of a statistical anthropometrist, invented the mug shot to show these differences.
